title: Apollo 与 Blackstone 为 Anthropic 完成 350 亿美元 AI 基础设施融资
full_text:
Jun 10th, 2026
Apollo Wraps Up $35B Chip Deal for Anthropic
Bloomberg's Emily Graffeo joins Matt Miller on "Bloomberg Deals." Apollo Global Management and Blackstone have finalized a $35 billion financing package for Anthropic to expand its AI infrastructure, marking the latest mega-deal in the AI race.
Duration: 3:10
Trump Says US Will Resume Attacking Iran 'Very Hard'
Duration: 5:13
Will Billionaires Really Flee a California Wealth Tax?
Duration: 9:28
Why The SpaceX IPO Is Unlike Any Other
Weekly Docs
Duration: 4:29
'Bloom Is Off the Rose' for Oracle, Cleo's Kunst Says
The Close
Duration: 7:19
Apollo's Kleinman Says PE Needs to Start Capitulating on Valuations
Duration: 1:39
Trump Says US Won’t Renew USMCA, Must Be Treated Better by Canada and Mexico
Duration: 20:00
Iran Was Never Going to Do a Deal, Nikki Haley Says
Balance of Power
Duration: 2:17
Will There Be Another Brexit Referendum?
